title: lunaria rediviva var. alpina
intro: Lunaria rediviva var. alpina, also known as the sky flower or honesty plant, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Lunaria rediviva var. alpina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers, leaves, or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
